title: Enhanced Jewelry
description: A datapack that adds a brand new, extensive jewelry system to Minecraft!
body:
![Enhanced Jewelry Header](https://i.imgur.com/ambVTFY.png) **Enhanced Jewelry introduces an extensive new jewelry system to Minecraft, featuring rings, bracelets, and necklaces, as well as seven unique gems that offer players various special attributes! Jewelry can be obtained through all sorts of different methods, from killing mobs, to looting structures, to even crafting it yourself!**
The bulk of the jewelry you can obtain is through crafting. There are three tiers of craftable jewelry, copper, iron, and gold. There are also seven different gems you can utilize to adorn your jewelry! Each one will grant a different effect. Depending on the gem you use, the effect will be weaker or stronger.|![A bunch of craftable jewelry](https://i.imgur.com/bmXGZq5.png) ---|--- ![Bare Recipes](https://i.imgur.com/nx4rTZK.jpg)| ![Two jewelry stations side by side](https://i.imgur.com/pH2FUH0.png)|The bases of the jewelry you can craft yourself can be made in an ordinary crafting table. But if you want to adorn this jewelry with any gems, you will need a jewelry station. There are two jewelry stations, iron and diamond. The iron jewelry station can be used to make adorned copper or iron jewelry, but a diamond jewelry station is needed if you want to make use of golden jewelry. ---|--- ​|![Jewelry Station Recipes](https://i.imgur.com/SdAK9sC.png) There is also a great deal of jewelry that can be found throughout your world! This jewelry can sometimes even grant effects that can't be crafted, or grant a strength of effect that can't be crafted. Most of this jewelry will even grant more than one effect! Some of this jewelry can be quite tricky to get, however!|![Bunch of uncraftable jewelry](https://i.imgur.com/jJ9HuLX.png) ---|--- |


![Discord Promo Image](https://i.imgur.com/1F6Q5Ft.png)
https://discord.gg/dKMxTjchsg
> If you want to know something about the datapack that isn't on this page, check out [my website](https://gamingbarn.net/Datapacks/4)! It has detailed documentation over every feature added by this datapack!
